[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111001111 8
1 0110011101 6
2 0000000000 a
3 0001011000 3
4 1001110110 6
5 1011110011 7
6 0011110101 6
7 0100000001 2
